rows.label: qev065403_MSG0001
rows.name:
I have acquaintances in the advance team too.
Please, you have to save them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065403_MSG0002
rows.name:
However, if we make too much of a fuss, it will spread anxiety
among the residents of NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065403_MSG0003
rows.name:
It's probably safer to head to the northern fortress
with a small number of people.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065403_MSG0004
rows.name: Oh, are you the BLADE who accepted Lara's request...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065403_MSG0005
rows.name:
W-Wait!
I am the real Clemons!
I'm not the Definian who provided the false information![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065403_MSG0006
rows.name: I was replaced by a fake without even realizing it myself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065403_MSG0007
rows.name:
It happened while I was away from NLA on a minor mission...
They really got me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065403_MSG0008
rows.name:
The enemy is currently taking the form of Suriella, right?
Well, I didn't see anyone like that in this direction.
I want you to check a different area.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065403_MSG0010
rows.name: I heard just a bit ago that a corpse was found in the Industrial Area.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065403_MSG0011
rows.name:
It's possible that this might be related to the current incident
involving the alien.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065403_MSG0012
rows.name:
Lara should have headed there as well, so why don't you
go check it out once?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065403_MSG0013
rows.name:
We might find out............
Some new truth, you know...?[ST:wait ]
